title: User containers.conf seccomp_profile = "unconfined" has no effect
body:
It looks like seccomp_profile from containers.conf wasn't wired in to Run(). ### Discussed in https://github.com/containers/buildah/discussions/6490
Originally posted by **XeCycle** November 9, 2025 I'm on Arch Linux host, and running Ubuntu jammy (and later) images has problems with the shipped seccomp profile. It works with `buildah from --security-opt seccomp=unconfined ubuntu:noble`; setting `containers.seccomp_profile = "unconfined"` in `~/.config/containers/containers.conf` works for podman, but not buildah. Which setting can I use with buildah so that I don't need to add those args on every call?

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
